title: Challenge Cards TCG
description: Adds collectible, completable challenge cards to the game inspired by the Challenge Cards TCG by Panini
body:
# Challenge Cards TCG [1.21.5]

This mod adds a whole swathe of trading cards to Minecraft! Based off of the Challenge Cards released by Panini, these trading cards encourage you to explore new challenges you might have otherwise not encountered. With over 100 cards to collect through various methods, there is plenty to do.

## Collect

Cards are collected through various rarities of card packs. These can be found spread about the many loot chests in the game, from villages to mineshafts, to the depths of the nether, and even the end! You can also fish for card packs if you're lucky enough, because of course you can.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3af5cc8cc4cc5ce8c4cf33e975a2f62a930e1b4.png)

Once you have your cards, you can craft a binder to store them in!

![BinderCraftingRecipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a09ecca03edb5f226b836d9e6915eead8945c09.png)

With over 100 slots, you'll have no problem holding onto your cards neatly.

![BinderOpen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4887b45c581974fcc663e931528a3ff0172c1cb8.png)

## Complete

Now that you have some cards, it's time to complete the challenge! Each card has a unique challenge for you to complete. If you're up to the task, completing the challenge will reward you with a holo version of the card!

![https://imgur.com/a/tmLHDqN.gif](https://i.imgur.com/9ITJt2c.gif)

![https://i.imgur.com/4wVriXq.gif](https://i.imgur.com/4wVriXq.gif)

## Display

What good would all of this work be if you can't show it off? Well, the display case does just that, allowing you to showcase all of your challenge prowess!
![DisplayCaseCards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9d79924339f1ae176a3138f8475b25e2c5101e1.png)

You can even showcase your favourite items besides cards!

![DisplayCaseRandomItems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/700e677d43911a27e7bd4a9d81d3f2aaebe0e7a7.png)

## Ultra Challenge

For those daring enough, hidden in ultra packs, there are torn scraps of cards lost to time. If you can collect the scraps and craft the original card, you will be ready for the ultimate challenges!

![https://i.imgur.com/hwcN243.gif](https://i.imgur.com/hwcN243.gif)


### Dependencies
- Fabric API
- Fabric Loader version > 0.16.13
